# Ashleigh Bruders Communications (ABC)

> Communications work, at its best, acts as a mirror. It takes what exists – within a brand, a team, an organisation – and gives it back in language and form that their purpose can be realised in.

## About

Ashleigh Bruders is a Melbourne-based (Naarm) brand and communications consultant working with the founders and leaders of purpose-led organisations building towards a better world. She works with purpose-led organisations, not-for-profits and government, across brand strategy, visual identity, websites, and communications to help them articulate and realise their mission.

Ashleigh spent twenty years in agencies and studios before founding Morrow Studio, a B Corp digital and communications studio. In 2025, she moved into independent practice as Ashleigh Bruders Communications (ABC).

## Engagements

Ashleigh works with a small number of organisations at any one time, across brand strategy, visual identity, communications and websites. Her engagements take a number of forms:

- Fractional role: Brand and communications leadership embedded within an organisation, typically one or two days a week.
- Strategic advisory: A regular thinking partnership for founders and leaders working through brand and communications questions over time.
- Project work: Focused engagements across positioning, brand, communications and websites.
